name: recoupable
description: Recoupable's marketplace of AI agent skills and plugins for the music industry.

plugins.name: recoupable-skills
plugins.description: Music-industry skills for AI agents — artist management, songwriting, analytics, release campaigns, research, content creation.

interface.shortDescription: Music industry skills for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Teach your coding agent how to manage artists, write songs, analyze music analytics, plan releases, and create content. General skills work for anyone; platform skills integrate with the Recoupable platform.
